sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_decision_question"> <sys_decision_question action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <answer>66cb73110f6f36502e576dd530d1b28a</answer> <condition table="var__m_sys_decision_input_12d9e3d90fab36502e576dd530d1b25b">u_dateBETWEENjavascript:gs.dateGenerate('2026-03-01','start')@javascript:gs.dateGenerate('2026-03-31','end')^EQ<item endquery="false" field="u_date" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="BETWEEN" or="false" value="javascript:gs.dateGenerate('2026-03-01','start')@javascript:gs.dateGenerate('2026-03-31','end')"/> <item endquery="true" field="" goto="false" newquery="false" operator="=" or="false" value=""/> </condition> <decision_table display_value="flow_and_script_decision_testv2">12d9e3d90fab36502e576dd530d1b25b</decision_table> <default_answer>false</default_answer> <input_table>var__m_sys_decision_input_12d9e3d90fab36502e576dd530d1b25b</input_table> <label>flow_and_script_decision_testv2_100</label> <marked_for_deletion>false</marked_for_deletion> <order>100</order> <sys_class_name>sys_decision_question</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-03-10 08:04:56</sys_created_on> <sys_domain>global</sys_domain> <sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path> <sys_id>e2d9f31d0f2f36502e576dd530d1b2ae</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>flow_and_script_decision_testv2_100</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="test" source="x_846092_test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_decision_question_e2d9f31d0f2f36502e576dd530d1b2ae</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-03-10 08:13:23</sys_updated_on> </sys_decision_question> </record_update>
